summary: W905 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W904's packaged W519 mapped-explicit-cokernel closed-map provider with its raw IsClosedMap field. This preserves the W899/W900/W901/W902/W903/W904 endpoint-homology-free closed-map route and keeps W716 boundary data, W717 relation data, W715 target data, W722 source triangulation, W856 endpoint facts, and W721 localized-right-adjoint data intact. Product success remains false because the remaining concrete fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W905 opens W519 mapped-cokernel closed-map data to its raw field, but the remaining W905 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W905 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W905 fields are selected-difference closed-map components, the raw mapped explicit cokernel IsClosedMap field, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, the W716 boundary-data provider, the W717 relation-data provider, the W715 target-surjective-compact provider, the W722 source-triangulation provider, the W856 endpoint topology facts provider, and the W721 localized-right-adjoint data provider.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the twenty-eight W905 closed-map mapped-cokernel-field target-data relation-data boundary-data source-triangulation endpoint-facts explicit field inputs.

Choose whether the next smallest contract-closing increment should expose W718 selected closed-map component fields, strict preimage object/map fields, fixed-target uniqueness, source-image normalization, or another currently supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
